name: Motion revenue, funding & news | Sacra
snippet:
Sep 8, 2025 — Sacra estimates that Motion reached $50M in annual recurring revenue (ARR) in August 2025. The company saw rapid growth following the launch ...
Sacra estimates that Motion reached $50M in annual recurring revenue (ARR) in August 2025. The company saw rapid growth following the launch of its AI Employees product, increasing from several million in ARR to eight-figure revenue within three months in 2025.

The company previously reported $2M in 2024, $972.2K in 2023, $392K in 2021. Since its launch in 2019, Motion has shown consistent revenue growth, reflecting its expanding user base and increasing adoption across various industries.

name: Motion ARR Hits $50M - ARR Club: Track & Compare Startup
snippet: Motion, the AI-native work management platform revolutionizing productivity for SMBs, has achieved an annual recurring revenue (ARR) of $50 million, while AI Employees alone has surged from $0 to 8-figure ARR in just three months since launching.
